# services.ceph

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.ceph`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.ceph.client.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Ceph client configuration. |
| `services.ceph.client.extraConfig` | `attribute set of attribute set of string` | Extra configuration to add to the client section. Configuration for rados gateways would be added here, with their own sections, see example. |
| `services.ceph.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Ceph global configuration. |
| `services.ceph.extraConfig` | `attribute set of string` | Extra configuration to add to the global section. Use for setting values that are common for all daemons in the cluster. |
| `services.ceph.global.authClientRequired` | `one of "cephx", "none"` | Enables requiring the cluster to authenticate itself to the client. |
| `services.ceph.global.authClusterRequired` | `one of "cephx", "none"` | Enables requiring daemons to authenticate with eachother in the cluster. |
| `services.ceph.global.authServiceRequired` | `one of "cephx", "none"` | Enables requiring clients to authenticate with the cluster to access services in the cluster (e.g. radosgw, mds or osd). |
| `services.ceph.global.clusterName` | `string` | Name of cluster |
| `services.ceph.global.clusterNetwork` | `null or strings concatenated with ","` | A comma-separated list of subnets that will be used as cluster networks in the cluster. |
| `services.ceph.global.fsid` | `string` | Filesystem ID, a generated uuid, its must be generated and set before attempting to start a cluster |
| `services.ceph.global.maxOpenFiles` | `signed integer` | Max open files for each OSD daemon. |
| `services.ceph.global.mgrModulePath` | `absolute path` | Path at which to find ceph-mgr modules. |
| `services.ceph.global.monHost` | `null or strings concatenated with ","` | List of hostname shortnames/IP addresses of the initial monitors. |
| `services.ceph.global.monInitialMembers` | `null or strings concatenated with ","` | List of hosts that will be used as monitors at startup. |
| `services.ceph.global.publicNetwork` | `null or strings concatenated with ","` | A comma-separated list of subnets that will be used as public networks in the cluster. |
| `services.ceph.global.rgwMimeTypesFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to mime types used by radosgw. |
| `services.ceph.mds.daemons` | `list of string` | A list of metadata service daemons that should have a service created. The names correspond to the id part in ceph i.e. [ "name1" ] would result in mds.name1 |
| `services.ceph.mds.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Ceph MDS daemon. |
| `services.ceph.mds.extraConfig` | `attribute set of string` | Extra configuration to add to the MDS section. |
| `services.ceph.mds.package` | `package` | The ceph package to use. |
| `services.ceph.mgr.daemons` | `list of string` | A list of names for manager daemons that should have a service created. The names correspond to the id part in ceph i.e. [ "name1" ] would result in mgr.name1 |
| `services.ceph.mgr.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Ceph MGR daemon. |
| `services.ceph.mgr.extraConfig` | `attribute set of string` | Extra configuration to add to the global section for manager daemons. |
| `services.ceph.mgr.package` | `package` | The ceph package to use. |
| `services.ceph.mon.daemons` | `list of string` | A list of monitor daemons that should have a service created. The names correspond to the id part in ceph i.e. [ "name1" ] would result in mon.name1 |
| `services.ceph.mon.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Ceph MON daemon. |
| `services.ceph.mon.extraConfig` | `attribute set of string` | Extra configuration to add to the monitor section. |
| `services.ceph.mon.package` | `package` | The ceph package to use. |
| `services.ceph.osd.daemons` | `list of string` | A list of OSD daemons that should have a service created. The names correspond to the id part in ceph i.e. [ "name1" ] would result in osd.name1 |
| `services.ceph.osd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Ceph OSD daemon. |
| `services.ceph.osd.extraConfig` | `attribute set of string` | Extra configuration to add to the OSD section. |
| `services.ceph.osd.package` | `package` | The ceph package to use. |
| `services.ceph.rgw.daemons` | `list of string` | A list of rados gateway daemons that should have a service created. The names correspond to the id part in ceph i.e. [ "name1" ] would result in client.name1, radosgw daemons aren't daemons to cluster in the sense that OSD, MGR or MON daemons are. They are simply daemons, from ceph, that uses the cluster as a backend. |
| `services.ceph.rgw.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Ceph RadosGW daemon. |
| `services.ceph.rgw.package` | `package` | The ceph package to use. |
